label: Fault Detective
info: MIRA Conveyor Fault Detective demo. Subscribes to demo/cell1/conveyor/cv101/# and renders the HMI + chat panel.

name: What is the conveyor waiting on?
route fault
func:
flow.set('current_fault', msg.payload);
return [msg, msg];

name: compose banner
extract value
func:
msg.payload = (msg.payload && msg.payload.value) ? msg.payload.value : 'nothing';
return msg;

name: Conveyor SVG
build inject request
SELECT recent events
sql: SELECT ts, fault, ROUND(confidence, 2) as confidence, affected_json FROM conveyor_events ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20

name: shape for table
compose chat request
extract reply
extract value
func:
msg.payload = (msg.payload && typeof msg.payload === 'object') ? msg.payload.value : msg.payload;
return msg;

name: build coil read
func:
msg.payload = {value: msg.payload, 'fc': 1, 'unitid': 1, 'address': 0, 'quantity': 22};
return msg;

name: build HR read
func:
msg.payload = {value: msg.payload, 'fc': 3, 'unitid': 1, 'address': 100, 'quantity': 17};
return msg;
